hero.headline: Beyond the digital gap.
hero.subheadline: We build software that transforms. AI that decides.

services.label: What we build
services.title: Solutions built to scale
services.subtitle: From custom software to AI-powered decisions — we cover every stage of your digital transformation.

build.name: Vostex Build
build.description: Tailored software solutions designed around your business processes. From web apps to enterprise systems — built to last and grow with you.

intel.name: Vostex Intel
intel.description: We integrate artificial intelligence into your operations so your business makes better decisions, faster — with real data.

flow.name: Vostex Flow
flow.description: Eliminate repetitive manual tasks. We automate your workflows so your team focuses on what truly matters.

launch.name: Vostex Launch
launch.description: High-performance websites and e-commerce platforms. Your brand online, built to convert and built to impress.

portfolio.label: Our work
portfolio.title: Transformations we've delivered
portfolio.subtitle: Real projects. Real impact. Businesses that took the leap — and didn't look back.

about.label: Who we are
about.title: The partner your business deserves
about.description: VOSTEX was born from a simple belief: every business deserves technology that actually works for them. We're not just a software vendor — we're the expert mentor that walks alongside your transformation.
about.origin: The name VOSTEX combines Provoste (our founder's surname) with the Latin suffix -ex — meaning advance, going beyond. Together: the leap forward.

reliability.title: Reliability
reliability.description: We deliver what we promise, on time, and stay with you after launch.

versatility.title: Versatility
versatility.description: We adapt to any industry, company size, and level of digital maturity.

scalability.title: Scalability
scalability.description: What we build today supports tomorrow. Every solution is designed to grow.

accessibility.title: Accessibility
accessibility.description: We make complex technology understandable and adoptable for non-technical users.

about.founder: Founded by Hernán Provoste · Valdivia, Chile
